description: Fixed source snapshots for the VetRetire retirement-pace classifier (pace-v1). Raw files live under data/sources/pace/raw/ (gitignored); derived aggregates are written to data/sources/pace/derived/pace_derived.json.

files.notes: USDA ERS 2020 Rural-Urban Commuting Area Codes, census tract CSV. Columns: TractFIPS20, PrimaryRUCA, Population, LandArea, PopDensity, UrbanAreaCode20.

EPA Smart Location Database v3 (Jan 2021). Fields: STATEFP,COUNTYFP,TRACTCE,BLKGRPCE,CBSA,TotPop,D1C,NatWalkInd,D3BPO4. GEOID reconstructed from FIPS parts (CSV GEOID columns may be scientific notation).
Census 2024 national place gazetteer (centroids). Used when street-address geocoding fails for CDPs / odd place names.
